family_map_header_name_help: If set, this name will be shown as the header in the Circle Map. Leave empty to use the circle name or default 'Circle'.
token_hint:
EU users – how to get your Bearer token:
1. Open https://life360.com/login
2. Enter your email address → click Continue
3. Enter the one-time code sent to your email
4. Open browser DevTools (F12) → Network tab
5. Find the POST request named 'token' and/or 'bearer' (not OPTIONS)
6. Open Preview / Response tab → copy the value of 'access_token' and paste it below

Enter the token WITHOUT the word 'Bearer' and WITHOUT spaces!

The token is valid for several months.
life360_username: Email address (optional, fallback for password auth)
life360_username_help: Only needed if you want to use password-based login instead of token
location_unknown_name_help: Text shown in locationName when the person is at no known place (e.g. 'on tour'). Leave empty to keep blank.
screenshot_txt: Screenshots of the browser DevTools (F12) with the token value highlighted • (using DevTools in a new window is recommended):
help_txt: You can find more information in the 'Help' tab!
places_txt:
Here you can add your own locations (independent of the Life360 app) to, for example, calculate distances or receive notifications when people arrive at or leave a location.
 (Use a period instead of a comma for latitude and longitude)
tracker_enabled_help: Can also be controlled via state tracker.config.enabled (e.g. by CRON)
tracker_min_distance_help: A new point is saved only after this distance has been exceeded (5-500m)
tracker_route_weight_help: Width of the route line in pixels (1-10)
tracker_marker_opacity_help: Opacity of the position marker (0.0 = transparent, 1.0 = fully visible)
tracker_marker_size_help: Size factor for the position marker (0.5 = half, 1.0 = default, 2.0 = double)
tracker_info_txt: Color changes take effect automatically on the next GPS update. The map URL can be found under tracker.<Person>.url in the object tree.
tracker_clear_recordings_info: ⚠ Note: Clearing a person's recordings also affects the circle map, as it is built from the individual person data. The monthly GeoJSON files (currentYear) are not changed.
tracker_retention_days_help: Number of days to keep route data. Older days are removed automatically every day and on adapter start. 0 = keep forever.
tracker_map_legend_help: Displays a legend at the bottom of the map
tracker_map_size_help: Displays the map size in KB in the legend at the bottom of the map
place_radius: Radius (meters) in which a person is considered 'present'
